oneYear.summary: Increased risk of liver damage and worsening mental health due to excessive alcohol consumption

fiveYear.summary: Significant increase in risk of liver cirrhosis, pancreatitis, and certain types of cancer, with potential worsening of PCOS symptoms and mental health

tenYear.summary: Severe and potentially life-threatening health consequences, including liver failure, increased risk of certain cancers, and significant decline in mental and physical health

oneYear.summary: Increased risk of chronic diseases due to excessive sugar and salt intake, exacerbating existing conditions

fiveYear.summary: Significant decline in overall health, increased risk of cardiovascular disease and other complications

tenYear.summary: Severe health consequences, potential organ damage, and increased mortality risk

oneYear.summary: Reduced inflammation and improved hormonal balance, but potential for withdrawal symptoms and nutrient deficiencies
worseningConditions: PCOS symptoms may temporarily worsen due to withdrawal from sugar
newRisks: Nutrient deficiencies, particularly potassium and iodine
improvements: Reduced blood pressure, improved insulin sensitivity, decreased symptoms of Gastrointestinal Disorder

fiveYear.summary: Significant reduction in chronic disease risk, improved mental health, and reduced PCOS symptoms
newRisks: Osteoporosis risk if calcium intake is not adequately replaced
improvements: Reduced risk of Mental Health Disorder, improved skin health, decreased symptoms of Skin Condition

tenYear.summary: Substantial reduction in mortality risk, improved overall health, and reduced risk of chronic diseases
improvements: Reduced risk of Gastrointestinal Disorder, improved hormonal balance, decreased risk of osteoporosis with adequate calcium intake
